languages.text: {n}Лария прочищает горло, привлекая внимание.{/n} "Пред вами — Его Светлость {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Вольный Торговец{/g} Себериан фон Валанциус, владетель величайшего протектората Простора Коронус и держатель священного Торгового Патента, Спаситель династии фон Валанциус, Рассеивающий Тьму, Покоритель Януса". {n}Пронзительный взгляд голубых глаз женщины-сенешаля невероятно напоминает беглого Мастера Шепотов Теодоры.{/n}

{n}Laria clears her throat, drawing everyone's attention.{/n} "Before you stands His Lordship {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} Seberian von Valancius, possessor of the greatest protectorate in the Koronus Expanse and bearer of the sacred Warrant of Trade, Saviour of House von Valancius, Dispeller of Darkness, and Conqueror of Janus." {n}The female Seneschal's piercing blue-eyed stare is uncannily reminiscent of Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Лария прочищает горло, привлекая внимание.{/n} "Пред вами — Его Светлость {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Вольный Торговец{/g} Себериан фон Валанциус, владетель величайшего протектората Простора Коронус и держатель священного Торгового Патента, Спаситель династии фон Валанциус, Рассеивающий Тьму, Покоритель Януса". {n}Пронзительный взгляд голубых глаз женщины-сенешаля невероятно напоминает беглого Мастера Шепотов Теодоры.{/n}

{n}Laria clears her throat, drawing everyone's attention.{/n} "Before you stands His Lordship {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} Seberian von Valancius, possessor of the greatest protectorate in the Koronus Expanse and bearer of the sacred Warrant of Trade, Saviour of House von Valancius, Dispeller of Darkness, and Conqueror of Janus." {n}The female Seneschal's piercing blue-eyed stare is uncannily reminiscent of Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}菈丽雅清了清嗓子，将所有人的注意力都引了过来。{/n}“站在你面前的，是尊贵的{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}行商浪人{/g}塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，科罗努斯扩区最大属地的拥有者，神圣贸易授状的持有者，冯·瓦兰修斯家族的救世主，黑暗的驱散者，加努斯征服者。”{n}这位女总领锐利的蓝眸，像极了西奥多拉手下那名在逃的低语之主。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria clears her throat, drawing everyone's attention.{/n} "Before you stands His Lordship {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} Seberian von Valancius, possessor of the greatest protectorate in the Koronus Expanse and bearer of the sacred Warrant of Trade, Saviour of House von Valancius, Dispeller of Darkness, and Conqueror of Janus." {n}The female Seneschal's piercing blue-eyed stare is uncannily reminiscent of Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅清了清嗓子，将所有人的注意力都引了过来。{/n}“站在你面前的，是尊贵的{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}行商浪人{/g}塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，科罗努斯扩区最大属地的拥有者，神圣贸易授状的持有者，冯·瓦兰修斯家族的救世主，黑暗的驱散者，加努斯征服者。”{n}这位女总领锐利的蓝眸，像极了西奥多拉手下那名在逃的低语之主。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria s'éclaircit la gorge comme pour demander le silence.{/n} « Vous êtes en présence de Sa Seigneurie le {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}libre-marchand{/g} Seberian von Valancius, propriétaire du plus grand protectorat des Étendues de Koronus et détenteur de la lettre de marque sacrée, sauveur de la maison von Valancius, pourfendeur des ténèbres et conquérant de Janus. » {n}Les yeux bleus perçants de la sénéchale vous rappellent étrangement le maître des murmures en fuite de Théodora.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria clears her throat, drawing everyone's attention.{/n} "Before you stands His Lordship {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} Seberian von Valancius, possessor of the greatest protectorate in the Koronus Expanse and bearer of the sacred Warrant of Trade, Saviour of House von Valancius, Dispeller of Darkness, and Conqueror of Janus." {n}The female Seneschal's piercing blue-eyed stare is uncannily reminiscent of Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria s'éclaircit la gorge comme pour demander le silence.{/n} « Vous êtes en présence de Sa Seigneurie le {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}libre-marchand{/g} Seberian von Valancius, propriétaire du plus grand protectorat des Étendues de Koronus et détenteur de la lettre de marque sacrée, sauveur de la maison von Valancius, pourfendeur des ténèbres et conquérant de Janus. » {n}Les yeux bleus perçants de la sénéchale vous rappellent étrangement le maître des murmures en fuite de Théodora.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria, boğazını temizleyerek herkesin dikkatini çekiyor.{/n} "Karşınızda Koronus Enginliği'ndeki en büyük protektoranın sahibi ve kutsal Ticari Ruhsatname'nin Hamili, von Valancius Hanesi'nin Kurtarıcısı, Karanlığı Defeden ve Janus'un Fatihi {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Hür Tacir{/g} Seberian von Valancius Hazretleri duruyor." {n}Kadın Seneşal'in delici mavi gözlü bakışları, rahatsız edici derecede Theodora'nın kaçak Fısıltı Üstadı'nı andırıyor{/n}.
languages.original_text: {n}Laria clears her throat, drawing everyone's attention.{/n} "Before you stands His Lordship {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} Seberian von Valancius, possessor of the greatest protectorate in the Koronus Expanse and bearer of the sacred Warrant of Trade, Saviour of House von Valancius, Dispeller of Darkness, and Conqueror of Janus." {n}The female Seneschal's piercing blue-eyed stare is uncannily reminiscent of Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria, boğazını temizleyerek herkesin dikkatini çekiyor.{/n} "Karşınızda Koronus Enginliği'ndeki en büyük protektoranın sahibi ve kutsal Ticari Ruhsatname'nin Hamili, von Valancius Hanesi'nin Kurtarıcısı, Karanlığı Defeden ve Janus'un Fatihi {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Hür Tacir{/g} Seberian von Valancius Hazretleri duruyor." {n}Kadın Seneşal'in delici mavi gözlü bakışları, rahatsız edici derecede Theodora'nın kaçak Fısıltı Üstadı'nı andırıyor{/n}.

languages.text: {n}Laria carraspea, llamando la atención de todo el mundo.{/n} «Se encuentran todos ante milord, el {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Comerciante Independiente{/g} Seberian von Valancius, poseedor del mayor protectorado de la Extensión de Koronus y portador de la sagrada Patente de Comercio, salvador de la casa von Valancius, disipador de tinieblas y conquistador de Janus». {n}La penetrante mirada azul de la Senescal te recuerda mucho a la del fugitivo maestro de susurros de Theodora.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria clears her throat, drawing everyone's attention.{/n} "Before you stands His Lordship {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} Seberian von Valancius, possessor of the greatest protectorate in the Koronus Expanse and bearer of the sacred Warrant of Trade, Saviour of House von Valancius, Dispeller of Darkness, and Conqueror of Janus." {n}The female Seneschal's piercing blue-eyed stare is uncannily reminiscent of Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria carraspea, llamando la atención de todo el mundo.{/n} «Se encuentran todos ante milord, el {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Comerciante Independiente{/g} Seberian von Valancius, poseedor del mayor protectorado de la Extensión de Koronus y portador de la sagrada Patente de Comercio, salvador de la casa von Valancius, disipador de tinieblas y conquistador de Janus». {n}La penetrante mirada azul de la Senescal te recuerda mucho a la del fugitivo maestro de susurros de Theodora.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria räuspert sich und zieht die Aufmerksamkeit aller Anwesenden auf sich.{/n} "Vor Euch steht seine Lordschaft {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Freihändler{/g} Seberian von Valancius, Besitzer des größten Protektorats in der Koronus-Ausdehnung, Träger des heiligen Handelsbriefs, Erlöser des Hauses von Valancius, Feind der Dunkelheit und Eroberer von Janus." {n}Die durchdringenden blauen Augen der Truchsessin haben eine unheimliche Ähnlichkeit mit Theodoras flüchtigem Meister des Geflüsters.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria clears her throat, drawing everyone's attention.{/n} "Before you stands His Lordship {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} Seberian von Valancius, possessor of the greatest protectorate in the Koronus Expanse and bearer of the sacred Warrant of Trade, Saviour of House von Valancius, Dispeller of Darkness, and Conqueror of Janus." {n}The female Seneschal's piercing blue-eyed stare is uncannily reminiscent of Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria räuspert sich und zieht die Aufmerksamkeit aller Anwesenden auf sich.{/n} "Vor Euch steht seine Lordschaft {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Freihändler{/g} Seberian von Valancius, Besitzer des größten Protektorats in der Koronus-Ausdehnung, Träger des heiligen Handelsbriefs, Erlöser des Hauses von Valancius, Feind der Dunkelheit und Eroberer von Janus." {n}Die durchdringenden blauen Augen der Truchsessin haben eine unheimliche Ähnlichkeit mit Theodoras flüchtigem Meister des Geflüsters.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ラリアが喉を鳴らして、皆の注意を引きつけた。{/n}「目の前の貴方は、コーロナス・エクスパンションで最も大きな保護領を所有し、聖なる貿易証書を携え、ヴァランシウス家の救世主、闇の払拭者、そしてジャヌスの征服者である、{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}ローグ・トレーダー{/g}のセベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウス卿です。」{n}女執事の鋭い青い瞳は、逃亡したマスター・オブ・ウィスパーのテオドラを思い起こさせる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria clears her throat, drawing everyone's attention.{/n} "Before you stands His Lordship {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} Seberian von Valancius, possessor of the greatest protectorate in the Koronus Expanse and bearer of the sacred Warrant of Trade, Saviour of House von Valancius, Dispeller of Darkness, and Conqueror of Janus." {n}The female Seneschal's piercing blue-eyed stare is uncannily reminiscent of Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n}
